packageLevelPlaceholder: Please enter level value. Higher level packages cannot be downgraded to lower level packages. Same level packages are not affected
sortPlaceholder: Default is 0, sorted from small to large
subtitle: Promotional Subtitle
subtitlePlaceholder: Please enter promotional subtitle, e.g. Most Popular Package
teamMemberLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of members allowed in an organization
workspaceLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of workspaces a user can create
topicLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of topics a user can create
topicShareLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of topic playbacks a user can share
generateWebLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of websites a user can generate
singleUserMuTaskConcurrencyLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of tasks a user can run simultaneously
singleUserMaxExecutionRoundsDesc: Controls the maximum number of execution rounds for a single task per user
singleTaskSingleRoundConsumptionLimit: Single Task Single Round Consumption Limit
singleTaskSingleRoundConsumptionLimitDes: Controls the maximum points consumption per round for a single task
singleTaskTotalConsumptionLimitDesc: Controls the maximum total points consumption for a single task
superMagicCopyLimitDesc: Controls the maximum number of projects a user can copy
emptyModel: No available models for this package, please add
emptyPackageDesc:
All models are available for this package, 
adding models to the available area will allow independent setting of billing methods
noSubscriptionDesc: No subscription settings configured, at least one subscription setting is required
allModelAvailableDesc: Enable to make all models available by default, and set the billing method separately if additional billing methods are needed
alreadyExists: Model already exists, please do not add it again
isPointRecharge: Is it possible to recharge points
